title: Adaptation in Microservice-based Systems: A Systematic Literature Review
author: Gómez-Muñoz, Luisa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data extraction from the paper: Adaptation in Microservice-based Systems: A Systematic Literature Review. 

 The attached file contains the result of data extraction from the primary studies following the defined extraction criteria, where:  

 
	  1 , corresponds to the property option that was identified in the study, 
	  NS  denotes that the property was specified in the study, and 
	  Ad.  denotes an additional option to the main one identified for that particular property.
steps_raw:
Data extraction from the paper: Adaptation in Microservice-based Systems: A Systematic Literature Review. 

 The attached file contains the result of data extraction from the primary studies following the defined extraction criteria, where:
